axis: PSI calibration AUTO-APPLY — cached calibration TSV + freshness-tracked env emitter, decoupled from hexa_remote
verdict: CACHE TOOL SHIPPED — Phase A (option D) of operator-lift removal complete

operational_debt_addressed.before: Operator manually runs `eval "$(hexa run tool/psi_calibrate_emit.hexa --env-only)"` per shell session OR before each hexa_remote invocation. If skipped, calibration sits idle.
operational_debt_addressed.after_phase_a: Operator runs `eval "$(hexa run tool/psi_calibration_cache.hexa)"` ONCE; cache TSV becomes SSOT of applied thresholds. Auto-refreshes if >24h stale. Subsequent --print-only re-sources are sub-second (no analyzer recompute).
operational_debt_addressed.deferred_phase_b: launchd LaunchAgent plist to refresh cache daily — not in this cycle, scope-tight gate applied per brief PHASING.
operational_debt_addressed.deferred_phase_c: scripts/bin/hexa_remote auto-source on host selection — DEFERRED until parallel-session activity around hexa_remote stabilizes (Wave 21, ω-network-4 backup observed).

predecessors.omega-network-2: single global HEXA_REMOTE_PSI_THRESHOLD env (default 80) + observability TSV log
predecessors.omega-network-3: calibration policy (tight=p95+5/cap95; generous=max+10/floor30; ok=KEEP; gate count<50)
predecessors.omega-network-4: scripts/bin/hexa_remote env-var lookup HEXA_REMOTE_PSI_THRESHOLD_<HOST_UPPER> + 7-col TSV + initial op recommendations
predecessors.omega-network-5: tool/psi_calibrate_emit.hexa — sourceable env emitter (committed 97c65c8a). Operator must manually `eval` per shell session.
predecessors.omega-network-6: THIS CYCLE — tool/psi_calibration_cache.hexa wraps emit, caches result to state/psi_calibration_active.tsv, auto-refreshes when stale; emits FRESH/STALE/REFRESHED/FALLBACK sentinel.

preconditions_verified.note: 346 rows at network-5 closure → 399 rows now (53 new probes, ω-network-4 src=default80 lineage continues)

options_considered.A: Modify scripts/bin/hexa_remote to auto-source psi_calibrate_emit at startup. REJECTED — parallel-session collision risk per brief (Wave 21 backup file observed).
options_considered.B: New shell wrapper / launchd plist that sources before hexa_remote. REJECTED — separate invocation path, users must remember to use it.
options_considered.C: Static threshold table file hexa_remote reads directly. REJECTED — requires hexa_remote modification (option A risk).
options_considered.D: New .hexa tool wrapping psi_calibrate_emit + cache file + freshness sentinel. SELECTED — zero hexa_remote touch, sweeper-safe, hexa-only-suffix compliant.
options_considered.E: Option D + launchd LaunchAgent for daily auto-refresh. DEFERRED — Phase B follow-up.

design_decision.phasing_rationale: Brief explicitly directs Phase A = option D this cycle, defer E. Followed.

tool_added.rollback: rm /Users/ghost/core/nexus/tool/psi_calibration_cache.hexa /Users/ghost/core/nexus/state/psi_calibration_active.tsv — ZERO blast radius (read-only over psi log; cache TSV is a derivative; emit tool unchanged).

cache_file.tracked_decision_rationale: Cache is regenerated on every refresh (overwrite, not append). Force-adding a stub like bridge-14 would result in constantly-dirty working tree because timestamps drift. Schema documented HERE in closure JSON instead. Operator can recreate via `hexa run tool/psi_calibration_cache.hexa --refresh-force`.

schema.host_special_value: * (asterisk) — global default fallback row, always present

tool_subcommands.(default): Refresh if stale (>24h) or missing, then emit env exports + sentinel
tool_subcommands.--refresh-force: Force refresh regardless of cache age
tool_subcommands.--print-only: Emit current cache as exports without refreshing (exit 2 if cache missing)

validation_3_cases.description: No cache file (fresh install) — expect REFRESHED

validation_3_cases.command: hexa run tool/psi_calibration_cache.hexa  # second run, no force

validation_3_cases.description: Stale mtime (touch -t 202604240000 = 2 days back) — expect REFRESHED

eval_safety.result: all 5 exports applied to subshell env without errors

constraints_honored.history_ops: no HEAD~N — pinned SHA at fb7d70a7 (HEAD before this commit)

operator_apply_path_post_n6: 1. ONE-TIME PER SHELL: eval "$(hexa run tool/psi_calibration_cache.hexa)"
2. (Cache survives across shells; subsequent shells can use --print-only for sub-second re-source.)
3. Trigger hexa_remote — env vars HEXA_REMOTE_PSI_THRESHOLD_<HOST> are now in effect.
4. After 24h, the next invocation auto-refreshes (REFRESHED sentinel logged); operator can also `--refresh-force` after manually rebuilding the psi log.
5. Optional: tail state/psi_calibration_active.tsv to inspect what's currently 'applied of record'.

next_cycle_candidates.omega-network-6b: launchd LaunchAgent plist (~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.nexus.psi-calibration-refresh.plist) running tool/psi_calibration_cache.hexa --refresh-force daily — Phase B of this work. Scope: ~30-line .plist + minimal validation.
next_cycle_candidates.omega-network-6c: scripts/bin/hexa_remote one-line wrapper that sources the cache before host selection — when parallel-session activity on hexa_remote subsides. Replace operator's `eval` with auto-source from the cache TSV directly (no analyzer call).
next_cycle_candidates.omega-network-7: Drift detector — compare freshly-calibrated suggestion vs cache TSV; alert if any host drifts >10%, indicating workload shift.

git_commit.scope: EXPLICIT-PATH single commit in nexus repo
files_not_committed_intentionally: state/psi_calibration_active.tsv (gitignored, regenerable; schema lives in this closure JSON)
